facebook.caption: 4.4 stars. 86 reviews. And this beach bar is sitting right on Đường Trần Hưng Đạo. Mojito Beach Bar delivers cold drinks, sand underfoot, and zero pretension. The kind of place you show up for one round and stay for three. Phu Quoc has plenty of tourist traps. This one earns its rating. Save this for your Phu Quoc trip.
facebook.video_caption: Drinks hitting. Sand underfoot. Mojito Beach Bar on Đường Trần Hưng Đạo is 4.4 stars for a reason. Pull up a seat and stay longer than you planned.

instagram.caption: 4.4 stars. 86 reviews. Mojito Beach Bar earns every one. Cold drinks, sand, no fuss. Tag your travel buddy.
instagram.video_caption: One round turns into three. Mojito Beach Bar, Phú Quốc. 4.4 stars. Judge for yourself.
